caption: A presentation slide for a course on "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING" is displayed, featuring a table titled "Performance of L – H System." The table compares four fluids—N₂, Ar, Air, and O₂—listing their "Boill. Pt", "v", "II/m", "II/m₂", and "FOM" values. The bottom of the slide includes the "NPTEL" logo and text attributing the content to "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay." As the sequence progresses, the slide remains static until a bullet point appears below the table in the final frames. This text reads: "The above table is for a Linde – Hampson system when the pressures are from 1 bar to 200 bar at 300K." The background is a consistent blue and white theme, and the focus remains entirely on the technical data and accompanying descriptive text throughout the clip.
